name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, high customer churn causes lost revenue. We provide insights to reduce churn instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: High customer churn rates leading to lost revenue.
